title: arum orientale subsp. nigrum
intro: Arum orientale subsp. nigrum, also known as the Black Calla Lily, is a subspecies of the Arum orientale plant, a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Arum orientale subsp. nigrum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Arum orientale subsp. nigrum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
